{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/47313?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/fabpot", "id": 47313, "login": "fabpot", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ3MzEz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/fabpot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47732", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Description

`SandboxNodeVisitor` enforces `SecurityPolicy::checkMethodAllowed()` for implicit `__toString()` calls by wrapping selected AST nodes in `CheckToStringNode`. The set of wrapped nodes is incomplete, and several Twig language constructs still trigger PHP string coercion on a `Stringable` operand without first consulting the policy. A sandboxed template author can therefore invoke `__toString()` on any object reachable in the render context, even when `__toString` on its class is not allowlisted.

Confirmed bypass vectors:

- Conditional expressions (`a ? b : c`, `a ?: b`, `a ?? b`) used as the input of a string-coercing filter or as a filter/function argument.
- The `matches` operator and the loose comparison operators (`==`, `!=`, `<`, `>`, `<=`, `>=`, `<=>`), which coerce a `Stringable` operand to string and can be used as an oracle to recover the value byte by byte (no tag, filter or function needs to be allowlisted).
- Twig tests in general (which were never policy-gated), in particular `is empty` which casts a `Stringable` value via `(string) $value` in `CoreExtension::testEmpty()`.
- Null-coalesce expressions nested in concatenation, and the direct output of allowed functions or filters that return a `Stringable` object.
- Arguments passed to allowed object methods, template-name expressions of template-loading tags (`include`, `extends`, `use`, ...), dynamic attribute/property names, and spread arguments from `Traversable` objects.
- The `do` tag and the `..` range operator.

### Resolution

The sandbox now wraps every child node that the parent will string-coerce at runtime, instead of relying on a hardcoded list of node types in `SandboxNodeVisitor`. A new `Twig\Node\CoercesChildrenToStringInterface` lets nodes declare which of their children must be guarded; core nodes (concatenation, comparison and range binaries, filter/function/test expressions, `do`, `include`, `extends`, `use`, ...) implement it. Spread arguments are materialised and policy-checked via the new `SandboxExtension::ensureSpreadAllowed()`, and dynamic attribute names are checked at runtime inside `CoreExtension::getAttribute()`.

### Credits

Twig would like to thank Anthropic Glasswing and El Kharoubi Iosif for reporting the issues, and Fabien Potencier for providing the fixes.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0036, "percentile": 0.28222}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T21:47:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47732"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T21:47:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/security/advisories/GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/twig/twig/CVE-2026-47732.yaml", "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/releases/tag/v3.26.0", "https://symfony.com/cve-2026-47732", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/twigphp/Twig/security-advisories/GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig", "summary": "Twig: Sandbox: multiple `__toString()` policy bypasses via unguarded string coercion points", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T21:47:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr2w-4gpj-cpq4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.26.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "twig/twig"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.25.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Twig: Sandbox: multiple `__toString()` policy bypasses via unguarded string coercion points
